TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_LuiseLapai, title = LuiseLapai, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/LuiseLapai} }

S.FORM: Ť∑ĮśėďÁĶ≤‚ÄĘśčČŤ≤Ě(ś≥ēŤ™ě:Louise Lab√©),(1524ŚĻīÔľć1566ŚĻī), . Luise.Lapai (kamu nu Hulam: Ť∑ĮśėďÁĶ≤‚ÄĘśčČŤ≤Ě)(ś≥ēŤ™ě:Louise Lab√©), 1524 mihcaan katuku 1566 mihcaan, wenifusin seci O-cuo sezin. Nisulitan nida tu ike atu masasunamuh sabaw tu sepat a nisulitan kasinganganan. pakaicelangen nida ku tataynaan a tademaw pisuayawi tu lalangawan nu udip, caay kaw sakayilay tu uduudu'an atu dikuc. ŚēäÔľĀŤč•śąĎś≠§ŚąĽ‚Ä¶‚Ä¶Ť∑ĮśėďÁĶ≤‚ÄĘśčČŤ≤Ě ah! ayda satu‚Ä¶. Luise.Lapai . Ah! anu ayda hantu taenng tayda i nasepian nida miabibi cinidaan, anu caay ka inapan nu taw, amelikay nu demiadan atu nialesan nida a acawa malaledi'. . anu miabibi cinida i takuwa, adidi ku ngiha' sakamusa : kanamuhan, paledien kaku, anu balngbangan, bayu, sawac caay tu pakaales i titaan. . anu palima kaku kelecen numaku ku baluwang nu misu, mahida u masay amilibed tu kilang, hatiniay tu nu lipahak ka enapan nutaw mahica, anu masasuadih ku mata sa mikisu kisu i takuwan, mabakah ku adingu numaku i bilbil, imahini mangalay kaku mapatay, mikikaka tu patay a lipahak. Itini i sabaw tu enem a seci nu Fakuo tataynaan matinengay misulit tu cudadan ci Luise.Lapai a cacayan nu sabaw tu sepat a lican nu cudadm, miala tu sayaway a aasipan, namakayda i cacay a malebut lima a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku lima anikatahekalan t aadihan. cacay ka yadah kunisulitan nida, kalaluman a dadiw tulu a dadadiwan, sabaw tu sepat a lican nu cudadan tusa a bataan idaw ku lima a dadadiwan, sipakayda i tataynaan amudadiw nu lawlawan a ngalay ku maadihay. tatayna misulitay atu cisnsese' malecaday i tawya, ina cisinsese' tada kahemekan tu, katelepen ku katahekalan ni Lapai a sakaadih, nika itini i Fakuo caay tu ka pawani nu taw. . u cudad nida kanamuhan, pahelakan, icelan ku balucu', u nika lawlawan nu masasumidangay a cudad ku sulitan, pasayda i lihalay nu nika sasumidangan ku nisulitan. Ť∑ĮśėďÁĶ≤‚ÄĘśčČŤ≤Ě:Áę∂śäÄŚ†īÁöĄŚ•≥Ť©©šļļLuise.Lapai : nikasetset a matinengay misulitay tu cudad a tatayna Śú®1524 . itini i cacay a malebut lima a lasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku sepat (1524) a mihcaan sikawaw tu sakasetset, idaw ku cacaya a sakasetset tu subayuan micidek ku kapah nu icelang. u mamala Kuowangay papatahekalen nida kina matinengay sakasetset tu subayuan papatayda i nuayawan mihaynamuh cinidaan. . hulak sahenay cinida tu tupel, mahetik ku tanayuay nu bukesan, mapaaw ci Henli atu milihidaay a tademaw. tawyaay misasetsetay tu subayuay a tademaw kanguen han ci Luise.Lapai . nina ka kunkuan itini i Fakuo matenes tu, alaw han awtatenaay tu a kakunkuan. . sakamusa namiladay cinida tu Fakuo a hitay milepacaw tu Sipaaya milawa tu Paipinian . nina tusaay a kakungkuan, nipacebaan nida a ngangan han ci La.pia.Yamasun atu KaPitayna'.Luise tu caaya kalecad nu kitakitan a nika sasumidangan. . nilecuhan ni Luise itini i sabaw tu enem a secian u teban nu Fakuo katahekalan cu cudadan Lian . Lian micapitu Fakuo nu walian a Luona sawacan, micapi tu Itali , mikikaka tu Pali tabakiay a cacudadan micidek ku utiih sikasasuwalan a Buksi , Lian a zinwencui kalamkam kunipatidengan. . nika siidaay nu lumaan a balaki cinida, misangaay tu laic misiwbaya a lauaman a wawaw cinida. amica kuni kacaay picudad nu wawma nida, nika papicudaden nami nida ku tataynaan atu tatamaan a wawaan. Luise minanam tu Latinwen , Sipanyawen atu Italiwen , atu misubayu atu censu'. caay kaw mahicaay kuyu wama, cacay a malebut lima a lasubu sepat a bataan idaw ku tulu a mihcaan idaw kunipiwanan tu kakakikungan. siacawa cinida tu mikikakaay cinidaan tu tulu a bataan nu mihcaan u siidaay a luma' nika caaya picudad nu misibaya a tademawan. malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: ******(**:r~…ĺouis…ô r~…ĺab*),(***********), . r~…ĺuis…ô.r~…ĺapai (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ******)(**:r~…ĺouis…ô r~…ĺab*), **** mińß ¶aan katuku **** mińß ¶aan, w…ônifusin s…ô ¶i o- ¶uo s…ôzin. nisur~…ĺitan nida tu ik…ô atu masasunamuńß sabaw tu s…ôpat a nisur~…ĺitan kasiŇčaŇčanan. pakai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč…ôn nida ku tatajnaan a tad…ômaw pisuajawi tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu udip, ¶aaj kaw sakajir~…ĺaj tu uduudu Ē~ °an atu diku ¶. ************** ańß! ajda satu*. r~…ĺuis…ô.r~…ĺapai . ańß! anu ajda ńßantu ta…ônŇč tajda i nas…ôpian nida miabibi ¶inidaan, anu ¶aaj ka inapan nu taw, am…ôr~…ĺikaj nu d…ômiadan atu niar~…ĺ…ôsan nida a a ¶awa mar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôdi Ē~ °. . anu miabibi ¶inida i takuwa, adidi ku Ňčińßa Ē~ ° sakamusa : kanamuńßan, par~…ĺ…ôdi…ôn kaku, anu bar~…ĺŇčbaŇčan, baju, sawa ¶ ¶aaj tu pakaar~…ĺ…ôs i titaan. . anu par~…ĺima kaku k…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶…ôn numaku ku bar~…ĺuwaŇč nu misu, mańßida u masaj amir~…ĺib…ôd tu kir~…ĺaŇč, ńßatiniaj tu nu r~…ĺipańßak ka …ônapan nutaw mańßi ¶a, anu masasuadińß ku mata sa mikisu kisu i takuwan, mabakańß ku adiŇču numaku i bir~…ĺbir~…ĺ, imańßini maŇčar~…ĺaj kaku mapataj, mikikaka tu pataj a r~…ĺipańßak. itini i sabaw tu …ôn…ôm a s…ô ¶i nu fakuo tatajnaan matin…ôŇčaj misur~…ĺit tu ¶udadan ¶i r~…ĺuis…ô.r~…ĺapai a ¶a ¶ajan nu sabaw tu s…ôpat a r~…ĺi ¶an nu ¶udadm, miar~…ĺa tu sajawaj a aasipan, namakajda i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut r~…ĺima a r~…ĺasubu r~…ĺima a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺima anikatańß…ôkar~…ĺan t aadińßan. ¶a ¶aj ka jadańß kunisur~…ĺitan nida, kar~…ĺar~…ĺuman a dadiw tur~…ĺu a dadadiwan, sabaw tu s…ôpat a r~…ĺi ¶an nu ¶udadan tusa a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺima a dadadiwan, sipakajda i tatajnaan amudadiw nu r~…ĺawr~…ĺawan a Ňčar~…ĺaj ku maadińßaj. tatajna misur~…ĺitaj atu ¶isns…ôs…ô Ē~ ° mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj i tawja, ina ¶isins…ôs…ô Ē~ ° tada kańß…ôm…ôkan tu, kat…ôr~…ĺ…ôp…ôn ku katańß…ôkar~…ĺan ni r~…ĺapai a sakaadińß, nika itini i fakuo ¶aaj tu ka pawani nu taw. . u ¶udad nida kanamuńßan, pańß…ôr~…ĺakan, i ¶…ôr~…ĺan ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, u nika r~…ĺawr~…ĺawan nu masasumidaŇčaj a ¶udad ku sur~…ĺitan, pasajda i r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj nu nika sasumidaŇčan ku nisur~…ĺitan. ******:*******r~…ĺuis…ô.r~…ĺapai : nikas…ôts…ôt a matin…ôŇčaj misur~…ĺitaj tu ¶udad a tatajna ***** . itini i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut r~…ĺima a r~…ĺasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku s…ôpat (****) a mińß ¶aan sikawaw tu sakas…ôts…ôt, idaw ku ¶a ¶aja a sakas…ôts…ôt tu subajuan mi ¶id…ôk ku kapańß nu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč. u mamar~…ĺa kuowaŇčaj papatańß…ôkar~…ĺ…ôn nida kina matin…ôŇčaj sakas…ôts…ôt tu subajuan papatajda i nuajawan mińßajnamuńß ¶inidaan. . ńßur~…ĺak sańß…ônaj ¶inida tu tup…ôr~…ĺ, mańß…ôtik ku tanajuaj nu buk…ôsan, mapaaw ¶i ńß…ônr~…ĺi atu mir~…ĺińßidaaj a tad…ômaw. tawjaaj misas…ôts…ôtaj tu subajuaj a tad…ômaw kaŇču…ôn ńßan ¶i r~…ĺuis…ô.r~…ĺapai . nina ka kunkuan itini i fakuo mat…ôn…ôs tu, ar~…ĺaw ńßan awtat…ônaaj tu a kakunkuan. . sakamusa namir~…ĺadaj ¶inida tu fakuo a ńßitaj mir~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw tu sipaaja mir~…ĺawa tu paipinian . nina tusaaj a kakuŇčkuan, nipa ¶…ôbaan nida a ŇčaŇčan ńßan ¶i r~…ĺa.pia.jamasun atu kapitajna Ē~ °.r~…ĺuis…ô tu ¶aaja kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu kitakitan a nika sasumidaŇčan. . nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ni r~…ĺuis…ô itini i sabaw tu …ôn…ôm a s…ô ¶ian u t…ôban nu fakuo katańß…ôkar~…ĺan ¶u ¶udadan r~…ĺian . r~…ĺian mi ¶apitu fakuo nu war~…ĺian a r~…ĺuona sawa ¶an, mi ¶api tu itar~…ĺi , mikikaka tu par~…ĺi tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan mi ¶id…ôk ku utiińß sikasasuwar~…ĺan a buksi , r~…ĺian a zinw…ôn ¶ui kar~…ĺamkam kunipatid…ôŇčan. . nika siidaaj nu r~…ĺumaan a bar~…ĺaki ¶inida, misaŇčaaj tu r~…ĺai ¶ misiwbaja a r~…ĺauaman a wawaw ¶inida. ami ¶a kuni ka ¶aaj pi ¶udad nu wawma nida, nika papi ¶udad…ôn nami nida ku tatajnaan atu tatamaan a wawaan. r~…ĺuis…ô minanam tu r~…ĺatinw…ôn , sipanjaw…ôn atu itar~…ĺiw…ôn , atu misubaju atu ¶…ônsu Ē~ °. ¶aaj kaw mańßi ¶aaj kuju wama, ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut r~…ĺima a r~…ĺasubu s…ôpat a bataan idaw ku tur~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan idaw kunipiwanan tu kakakikuŇčan. sia ¶awa ¶inida tu mikikakaaj ¶inidaan tu tur~…ĺu a bataan nu mińß ¶aan u siidaaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nika ¶aaja pi ¶udad nu misibaja a tad…ômawan. mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: Ť∑ĮśėďÁĶ≤‚ÄĘśčČŤ≤Ě(ś≥ēŤ™ě:Louise Lab√©),(1524ŚĻīÔľć1566ŚĻī), . Luise.Lapai (kamu nu Hulam: Ť∑ĮśėďÁĶ≤‚ÄĘśčČŤ≤Ě)(ś≥ēŤ™ě:Louise Lab√©), 1524 mihcaan katuku 1566 mihcaan, wenifusin seci O-cuo sezin. Nisulitan nida tu ike atu masasunamuh sabaw tu sepat a nisulitan kasinganganan. pakaicelangen nida ku tataynaan a tademaw pisuayawi tu lalangawan nu udip, caay kaw sakayilay tu uduudu'an atu dikuc. ŚēäÔľĀŤč•śąĎś≠§ŚąĽ‚Ä¶‚Ä¶Ť∑ĮśėďÁĶ≤‚ÄĘśčČŤ≤Ě ah! ayda satu‚Ä¶. Luise.Lapai . Ah! anu ayda hantu taenng tayda i nasepian nida miabibi cinidaan, anu caay ka inapan nu taw, amelikay nu demiadan atu nialesan nida a acawa malaledi'. . anu miabibi cinida i takuwa, adidi ku ngiha' sakamusa : kanamuhan, paledien kaku, anu balngbangan, bayu, sawac caay tu pakaales i titaan. . anu palima kaku kelecen numaku ku baluwang nu misu, mahida u masay amilibed tu kilang, hatiniay tu nu lipahak ka enapan nutaw mahica, anu masasuadih ku mata sa mikisu kisu i takuwan, mabakah ku adingu numaku i bilbil, imahini mangalay kaku mapatay, mikikaka tu patay a lipahak. Itini i sabaw tu enem a seci nu Fakuo tataynaan matinengay misulit tu cudadan ci Luise.Lapai a cacayan nu sabaw tu sepat a lican nu cudadm, miala tu sayaway a aasipan, namakayda i cacay a malebut lima a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku lima anikatahekalan t aadihan. cacay ka yadah kunisulitan nida, kalaluman a dadiw tulu a dadadiwan, sabaw tu sepat a lican nu cudadan tusa a bataan idaw ku lima a dadadiwan, sipakayda i tataynaan amudadiw nu lawlawan a ngalay ku maadihay. tatayna misulitay atu cisnsese' malecaday i tawya, ina cisinsese' tada kahemekan tu, katelepen ku katahekalan ni Lapai a sakaadih, nika itini i Fakuo caay tu ka pawani nu taw. . u cudad nida kanamuhan, pahelakan, icelan ku balucu', u nika lawlawan nu masasumidangay a cudad ku sulitan, pasayda i lihalay nu nika sasumidangan ku nisulitan. Ť∑ĮśėďÁĶ≤‚ÄĘśčČŤ≤Ě:Áę∂śäÄŚ†īÁöĄŚ•≥Ť©©šļļLuise.Lapai : nikasetset a matinengay misulitay tu cudad a tatayna Śú®1524 . itini i cacay a malebut lima a lasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku sepat (1524) a mihcaan sikawaw tu sakasetset, idaw ku cacaya a sakasetset tu subayuan micidek ku kapah nu icelang. u mamala Kuowangay papatahekalen nida kina matinengay sakasetset tu subayuan papatayda i nuayawan mihaynamuh cinidaan. . hulak sahenay cinida tu tupel, mahetik ku tanayuay nu bukesan, mapaaw ci Henli atu milihidaay a tademaw. tawyaay misasetsetay tu subayuay a tademaw kanguen han ci Luise.Lapai . nina ka kunkuan itini i Fakuo matenes tu, alaw han awtatenaay tu a kakunkuan. . sakamusa namiladay cinida tu Fakuo a hitay milepacaw tu Sipaaya milawa tu Paipinian . nina tusaay a kakungkuan, nipacebaan nida a ngangan han ci La.pia.Yamasun atu KaPitayna'.Luise tu caaya kalecad nu kitakitan a nika sasumidangan. . nilecuhan ni Luise itini i sabaw tu enem a secian u teban nu Fakuo katahekalan cu cudadan Lian . Lian micapitu Fakuo nu walian a Luona sawacan, micapi tu Itali , mikikaka tu Pali tabakiay a cacudadan micidek ku utiih sikasasuwalan a Buksi , Lian a zinwencui kalamkam kunipatidengan. . nika siidaay nu lumaan a balaki cinida, misangaay tu laic misiwbaya a lauaman a wawaw cinida. amica kuni kacaay picudad nu wawma nida, nika papicudaden nami nida ku tataynaan atu tatamaan a wawaan. Luise minanam tu Latinwen , Sipanyawen atu Italiwen , atu misubayu atu censu'. caay kaw mahicaay kuyu wama, cacay a malebut lima a lasubu sepat a bataan idaw ku tulu a mihcaan idaw kunipiwanan tu kakakikungan. siacawa cinida tu mikikakaay cinidaan tu tulu a bataan nu mihcaan u siidaay a luma' nika caaya picudad nu misibaya a tademawan. malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan

¶inida. ami ¶a kuni ka ¶aaj pi ¶udad nu wawma nida, nika papi ¶udad…ôn nami nida ku tatajnaan atu tatamaan a wawaan. r~…ĺuis…ô minanam tu r~…ĺatinw…ôn , sipanjaw…ôn atu itar~…ĺiw…ôn , atu misubaju atu ¶…ônsu Ē~ °. ¶aaj kaw mańßi ¶aaj kuju wama, ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut r~…ĺima a r~…ĺasubu s…ôpat a bataan idaw ku tur~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan idaw kunipiwanan tu kakakikuŇčan. sia ¶awa ¶inida tu mikikakaaj ¶inidaan tu tur~…ĺu a bataan nu mińß ¶aan u siidaaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nika ¶aaja pi ¶udad nu misibaja a tad…ômawan. mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
